description: A signed quality agreement between the organization and a supplier, covering quality responsibilities, test methods, specification standards, COA requirements, change-notification obligations, and audit rights. A signed, in-scope Quality Agreement is a mandatory gate for the supplier reaching ONBOARDED status under the material-type qualification (axiom A18). Each agreement carries a version, a scope covering one or more material types, and an expiry date; an expiring agreement triggers a renewal alert.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Quality Agreement ID
fields.purpose: Stable surrogate key for the agreement record; referenced by the SupplierQualification gate check.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: must reference an existing Supplier; immutable
fields.purpose: Binds the agreement to the supplier it governs; the qualification gate checks for an ACTIVE agreement scoped to the supplier's material type.

fields.name: version
fields.label: Version
fields.validation: non-blank; version string e.g. v1.0, v2.0; incremented on renewal or renegotiation; prior version becomes SUPERSEDED
fields.purpose: Identifies the revision of the agreement; when the agreement is renewed a new version is created, the prior version is SUPERSEDED, and the new version becomes ACTIVE so the qualification gate always resolves to the current terms.

fields.name: signedDate
fields.label: Signed Date
fields.validation: <= today; the date both parties executed the agreement
fields.purpose: The effective date of the agreement; establishes when the quality obligations came into force and anchors the validity period.

fields.name: expiryDate
fields.label: Expiry Date
fields.validation: > signedDate; alerts fire 30 days before expiry; an expired ACTIVE agreement moves to EXPIRED and may drive the supplier to SUSPENDED if not renewed before expiry
fields.purpose: The date the agreement ceases to be valid; a 30-day approaching-expiry alert is issued to Quality and the Buyer so renewal is initiated before the agreement lapses and the supplier loses its ONBOARDED qualification gate.

fields.name: scope
fields.label: Scope
fields.validation: non-blank; describes the material types, product categories, or specific items covered by the agreement; the qualification gate verifies the scope covers the material type being qualified
fields.purpose: Defines the coverage of the agreement so the qualification gate can confirm that the agreement applies to the specific material type being assessed and that supply outside the scope is not inadvertently treated as covered.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: DRAFT (not yet signed/uploaded) -> ACTIVE (signed + uploaded, signedDate set) -> EXPIRED (expiryDate passed and not renewed) | SUPERSEDED (replaced by a newer version); only ACTIVE gates ONBOARDED
fields.purpose: The lifecycle position of the agreement; only an ACTIVE agreement satisfies the qualification gate for ONBOARDED (axiom A18); an EXPIRED agreement may drive the supplier to SUSPENDED per the suspension rules.

invariants: A18 a signed ACTIVE Quality Agreement scoped to the material type is a mandatory gate for ONBOARDED; absence or expiry of the agreement blocks or reverts the qualification
A13 creation, activation, and expiry events are audited and broadcast
ACTIVE is the only status that satisfies the qualification gate; EXPIRED may drive supplier SUSPENDED
